summary: Revision 4 capability-boundary findings remain closed in Revision 5. The README restores the local validate and inspect CLI examples, preserves the in-memory no-write and no-launch specialist example boundary, assigns runtime effects to the external host, and limits core claims to compilation and approval-bound verification. Checker rules and negative fixtures anchor the restored commands, required core and host responsibility text, and forbidden runtime overclaims.
